title: Delhi court orders AAP, Saurabh Bharadwaj to remove defamatory posts against BJP's Bansuri Swaraj
description: A Delhi court on Thursday ordered AAP and its leaders Saurabh Bharadwaj and Ankush Narang to remove the defamatory post against BJP MP Bansuri Swaraj about her detention by Delhi Police during the protest over the defeat of Constitution (131st Amendment) Bill, 2026. Principal District & Sessions Judge Gurvinder Pal Singh of the Saket Court passed an interim order and also restrained Bharadwaj, AAP and Narang from publishing, hosting, uploading, circulating, reposting or disseminati
